name: Edge AI ML and IoT System (IIT Madras x PHN Technology)
description: The only IIT-led Edge AI Professional Certification program that bridges theory and industry-grade deployment — live, hands-on, and hardware-first. Learn to transform raw sensor data into deployed intelligence with Edge AI & IoT Systems.
mode: Live Instruction (Theory) + Remote Real Hardware Access (Practical)
schedule: Weekends Only (Cohort 1 starts June 5, 2026. Enrollment closes May 31, 2026)
prerequisites: Engineers and developers aiming to build real-world embedded ML systems.
instructor: Prof. Babji Srinivasan (IIT Madras) and Dr. Ramji Srinivasan (Adjunct Professor, IIT Madras)
syllabus: Module 1-2: ML Foundations for Edge Applications (6 Hours)
Module 6-9: Model Training for Edge Deployment (12 Hours)
Module 16: Capstone Presentation & Portfolio Completion (3 Hours)
highlights: 2+1 Format (2 Hours Theory + 1 Hour Practical per session)
Delivered by active IIT Madras professors
Remote hardware access with real-time practical (Seeed XIAO BLE Sense / Arduino UNO)
Fully deployed working system portfolio outcome
Live Case Studies: Weather prediction on Tiny ML, Non-voice audio classification
placement_support: Positions graduates for Edge AI Engineer (₹12-22 LPA), Embedded ML Developer (₹14-28 LPA), and ML Systems Engineer roles. Candidates with a deployed edge AI demo score 3x higher in technical screening.
certificate: IIT Madras Faculty Programme Certificate (IITM Pravartak)
